channel.title: Issues on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Issues on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Multi-select fields for Projects and Issues in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Projects and Issue fields now support multi-select fields in public preview, allowing a single field to store multiple values. This lets you tag an item with all relevant labels or categories instead of choosing just one.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Issue fields are now generally available
item.description:
Issue fields are now generally available for all GitHub organizations on Free, Team, Enterprise, and GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency plans. Support will also ship in GitHub Enterprise Server 3.23.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Restrict issue creation to collaborators only
item.description:
Repository admins can now limit issue creation to collaborators with write access. This adds control over who can open issues and helps reduce unwanted issue creation.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Saved views for repository issues – Public Preview and adjustable row heights in projects
item.description:
GitHub added saved views to repository Issues pages in public preview, allowing teams to create and share filtered issue views. The release also includes adjustable row heights in Projects.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub Agentic Workflows is now in public preview. It lets you automate reasoning-based tasks such as issue triage, CI failure analysis, and documentation updates using coding agents inside GitHub.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Manage sub-issues, types, and dependencies from GitHub CLI
item.description:
GitHub CLI now supports managing issue types, parent/sub-issue relationships, and issue dependencies directly from the terminal. This lets you structure and track issues without using the browser.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Issue fields are now in public preview for all organizations
item.description:
GitHub has made issue fields available in public preview for all organizations on github.com and GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency. The feature lets teams define typed metadata on issues, such as Priority and Effort.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Semantic issue search in Copilot Chat
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Chat on the web now supports natural-language issue search, grouping, and analysis using a new semantic issues index. Results are context-aware and intended to help users find relevant issues more quickly.

  • Source: GitHub
